content.text: Apply a bilateral filter to an image using WASM.

Takes a Uint8ClampedArray and its dimensions and applies a bilateral filter on the Uint8ClampedArray image.
The
`sigma_spatial`
and
`sigma_range`

set weights to the respective Gaussian kernels applied to spatial (x, y) and range (color) data -
they both have recommended default values applied.
The default
`color_space`
is 0, which is CIE LAB, but sRGB can be chosen by setting
`color_space`

= 1. CIE LAB is more
accurate, but sRGB is slightly faster.
bilateralFilter
The filtered image pixels.
If the WASM function fails.
Standard bilateral filter with default parameters

summary.text: Color space mode (0: CIE LAB; 1: sRGB).
The image pixel data (flat RGBA array).

content.text: Apply a black-biased threshold filter to reduce colors in an image.

Apply a simple sRGB bin-based threshold on the Uint8ClampedArray image.
The bins in this function are determined by the
`num_colors`
parameter.
blackThreshold
The thresholded image pixels.
If the WASM function fails.
Quantization Wiki
Support different bias levels for black/white thresholds.
Black-biased threshold with customizable number of colors

summary.text: Number of colors to reduce the image to.
The image pixel data (flat RGBA array).

content.text: Convert labeled regions to SVG contours.
Convert an input image and its labeled regions into an SVG.
findContours

summary.text: Label array from clustering (e.g., K-Means) or segmentation.
Minimum area of a region to be considered a contour.

content.text: Apply a Gaussian blur to an image using FFT in WASM.

Takes a Uint8ClampedArray and its dimensions and applies a Gaussian blur on the Uint8ClampedArray image.
The
`sigma_pixels`

parameter determines the blur radius and has a dynamic default value equal to 5% of the image's width.
Useful for denoising images by applying a low-pass filter. Sped up by a 2-D FFT.
gaussianBlur
The blurred image pixels.
If the WASM function fails or memory allocation fails.
Fix FFT zero-padding bug around edges of the image.
Standard Gaussian blur using FFT

summary.text: The image pixel data (flat RGBA array).
Standard deviation of the Gaussian blur (default=width*0.005; 5% of width).

content.text: Convert raster images (e.g., JPEG, PNG) to SVGs.
Convert an input raster image into an SVG. A unification of
`bilateralFilter`
`kmeans`
, and
`findContours`
imageToSvg
Generated SVG.
If the WASM function fails or input labels are invalid.
Convert a raster image (e.g., PNG, JPG) into an SVG.

summary.text: Minimum area of a region to be considered a contour.

content.text: Convert an image file into a
`Uint8ClampedArray`

of pixel data (RGBA).

 imageToUint8ClampedArray
Reads an image file (PNG, JPEG, etc.) and returns its pixel data as a
`Uint8ClampedArray`

.
Each pixel consists of four consecutive values: red, green, blue, and alpha (RGBA).
Also returns the image's original width and height. Useful for canvas operations,
image processing, WebGL textures, or computer vision tasks.

A Promise resolving to an object containing:
-
`pixels`
: A
`Uint8ClampedArray`

of RGBA pixel values.
-
`width`

: Width of the image in pixels.
-
`height`
: Height of the image in pixels.
Will not throw in current implementation, but could reject if the image fails to load.
Add error handling for invalid or corrupt image files.
Standard image file input

summary.text: The image file to process. Must be a valid

content.text: Cluster pixels using the K-Means algorithm in WASM.
Apply a standard K-Means clustering algorithm to the input image in the specified
`color_space`

(default is 0: CIE LAB, but 1: sRGB can be use) using pre-specified maximum color and iteration counts.
You can provide the
`out_pixels`
and
`out_labels`

arrays,
however this is atypical in JavaScript (since it is modified in-place and you will need to allocate a sufficiently large array),
so it is recommended to use the default arguments and returns.
kmeans
Clustered pixels and labels.
If the WASM function fails or iterations do not converge.
K-means clustering with default color space
